Typography System

Heading 1 — Playfair Display

Heading 2 — Playfair Display

Heading 3 — Playfair Display

Body text using Inter font family. This demonstrates the complete typographic system with proper hierarchy and brand-compliant font choices.

Code text using Source Code Pro

Enhanced PullQuote Component

Investigation Components

Evidence Cards

Confirmed Evidence

Evidence that has been verified through multiple independent sources.

Partially Verified

Evidence with some corroboration but requiring additional verification.

Disputed Evidence

Evidence that contradicts other findings and requires careful analysis.

Unverified Evidence

Evidence that has not yet been independently confirmed.

Source Reliability

Tier 1

Primary Source

Government documents, official records, first-hand testimony

Tier 2

Secondary Source

Reputable news organizations, academic research, verified reports

Tier 3

Tertiary Source

Social media, unverified claims, anonymous sources

Timeline Component

Initial Report

Investigation begins with initial evidence gathering

Verification Phase

Current phase: cross-referencing sources and evidence

Publication

Final analysis and public release of findings

Audio Player Component

02:15 06:30
